[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110100011 6
1 0001010001 3
2 0000110011 4
3 1110011101 7
4 0100000011 3
5 0011100011 5
6 1110010100 5
7 1111000100 5

01 10 0001100010 3
12 21 1110101110 7
23 32 1010011110 6
34 43 0111100000 4
45 54 1101110111 8
56 65 0001010000 2
67 76 0001100111 5
70 07 1111110010 7

57 75 0000110111 5

61 16 1111110111 9
